title: lysimachusa nummularia
intro: Lysimachusa nummularia, also known as Money Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine, valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant is known to provide health benefits such as wound healing, and anti-oxidative effects, which can help protect the body from oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Lysimachusa nummularia include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine.
